allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/cards.js'\).then\(m => { const cats = {}; for \(const c of m.CARDS\) { const k = \(c.requiredFlags?.length || c.requiredLegacyFlags?.length\) ? \(c.requiredLegacyFlags?.length ? 'arc/legacy' : 'chain'\) : 'base'; cats[k] = \(cats[k]||0\)+1; } console.log\('Total:', m.CARDS.length\); console.log\(cats\); }\)")
